overview: An AI App Compiler that converts natural language descriptions into fully validated application configurations through a 6-stage pipeline: intent extraction, system design, schema generation, refinement, validation, and repair.
features: Natural language to app config pipeline
6-stage compiler: Intent Extraction, System Design, Schema Generation, Refinement, Validation, Repair
Cross-layer validation: UI-API, API-DB, Auth-Role consistency
Automatic repair engine for invalid configurations
Runtime execution simulator with deployment report
Evaluation dashboard with 20 realistic SaaS test prompts
Live pipeline visualization showing each stage output
JSON inspector for all stage outputs
Metrics tracking: success rate, validation errors, repair count, processing time
